Title: Emergency fund below target
Why: Insufficient buffer for job loss or unexpected expenses
Action: Build to 3 months by adding $710.00/mo until $9,000.00

Title: Dining over budget
Why: Reduces savings capacity and may signal lifestyle creep
Action: Cap dining to $75.00/wk; review top 5 merchants
Evidence: Over budget 0 periods; $150.00 excess; Related: Savings rate below target
